steps.t: Sadauk-kala can be found in western Máttugard. You should travel to Sadauk-kala.
Sadauk-kala can be found in western Máttugard. You should confront the Iron Crown emissary.
Sadauk-kala can be found in western Máttugard. You should confront the Iron Crown emissary.
Voina can be found at Zidir-nesad, the Steepset, in Máttugard. You should talk to Voina.
